creator: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
text:
Hi Carlo,

I have a problem when running the command "bzr help commands" after
installing the updated port:

# bzr help commands
bzr: ERROR: No module named debian_bundle
You may need to install this Python library separately.

I checked Google to see if there's an easy fix, but I didn't turn
anything up just yet.  Do you have any ideas?

Regards,
Greg


	<http://www.linkedin.com/e/sig/146767/>
